posts.author: ElaraCrafts
posts.text: Finally finished my latest pottery wheel project! It's a bit rustic but I love the glaze. Spent all weekend in the studio, it was so relaxing to get my hands dirty again. #Pottery #WeekendProject #CreativeFinds
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby and creative achievement with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
